name: Trade Secret Chemical Reporting
description: The Green Valley Water Facility (Colchester, VT) has introduced a new proprietary water treatment polymer that is protected as a trade secret by the manufacturer. You must add this to their annual Tier II report without disclosing the specific chemical identity. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 application, import the facility's baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s. Navigate to the Chemical Inventory section and add a new chemical entry with the trade secret / withholding flag ENABLED. Provide the generic chemical class name: 'Proprietary polyacrylamide coagulant blend'. Ensure it is marked as a Mixture and NOT an EHS. Select the health hazards: 'Skin corrosion or irritation' and 'Serious eye damage or eye irritation' (no physical hazards). Enter inventory quantities: Maximum daily amount Range Code 04 (1,000 - 9,999 lbs), Average daily amount Range Code 03 (100 - 999 lbs), and 365 days on site. Add a storage location: Above-ground tank, Ambient pressure, Ambient temperature, Liquid, with the location description 'Chemical Feed Building 2'. Once complete, save and export the submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\tradesecret_update.t2s.
